services.title: Theme Management
services.description: Upload ZIP themes, activate with one click, and import demo content instantly to get any site live fast.

services.title: Rich Blog Editor
services.description: Write and publish posts with categories, tags, featured images and per-post SEO meta — no plugin needed.

services.title: Media Library
services.description: Upload, organize and reuse images and files from a single clean panel. Serve media on any page.

services.title: Roles & Permissions
services.description: Invite team members and control exactly who can create, edit, publish or delete content.

services.title: SEO Tools
services.description: Set meta title, description, Open Graph image and canonical URL on every page and blog post.

services.title: Public REST API
services.description: Every piece of content is available as clean JSON. Build any frontend in any framework — or upload a theme.

services.title: Analytics Dashboard
services.description: Track page views, top content and traffic sources right inside the dashboard.

services.title: Leads & Forms
services.description: Capture leads from contact forms and manage enquiries in the built-in leads inbox.

testimonials.content: Mero CMS saved us weeks of setup. We deployed a custom theme in a day and the client loved the simplicity of the dashboard.
Finally a CMS where I don't need a developer just to update the homepage. I handle all content changes myself now.
We run Mero CMS for all our client projects. The theme system lets us give each client a unique look without extra work.
The REST API made it trivial to build a mobile app on top of the same content. Best headless CMS experience I've had.

posts.title: Welcome to Mero CMS
posts.excerpt: Mero CMS is a flexible, open-source content management system built for modern websites. Here's what you can do with it.
posts.content:
Welcome to Mero CMS

Mero CMS is a headless content management system that gives you a clean admin dashboard and a public REST API. You can build any frontend on top of it — or just upload a theme ZIP and be live in minutes.

Key Features

  • Theme management with demo content import
  • Blog with categories, tags and SEO
  • Media library
  • Team, testimonials, services modules
  • User roles and permissions
  • Leads inbox

Get started by visiting the dashboard and running the setup wizard.

posts.title: How to Upload a Theme
posts.excerpt: Learn how to package your Next.js site as a Mero CMS theme ZIP and upload it to any CMS instance.
posts.content:
How to Upload a Theme

Mero CMS supports uploadable themes. A theme is a ZIP file containing a Next.js app with a theme.json at the root.

Steps

  1. Build your Next.js app
  2. Add a theme.json with name, slug, modules and seedData
  3. ZIP the directory (exclude node_modules, .next)
  4. Go to Dashboard → Themes → Upload Theme
  5. Click Setup, then Activate with demo content

posts.title: Managing Content with the REST API
posts.excerpt: Mero CMS exposes all your content as clean JSON endpoints. Here's how to use the public API in your frontend.
posts.content:
Using the REST API

Every Mero CMS instance exposes a public REST API at /public/*. You can fetch site settings, menus, pages, blog posts, plots, team members and more.

Common Endpoints

  • GET /public/site-data — settings, menus, services, testimonials
  • GET /posts/public?status=published — blog posts
  • GET /plots/public/list — property listings

Set CMS_API_URL in your theme's .env.local to point at your backend.
